# Groundlayer LLC

> Missouri holding company. Owns and operates four brands serving Kansas City small businesses: a web-design studio, a competitive-intelligence tool, a software-replacement studio, and the parent brand itself.

## What we are
Groundlayer LLC is a single-member Missouri limited liability company founded April 2026. The company itself does not sell services to end customers - it owns the brands that do.

## Operating brands (DBAs)
- **Simon L. Paige Web Design** - websites for Kansas City small businesses. https://simonlpaige.com
- **RivalDrop** - competitive intelligence for Shopify brands. https://rivaldrop.com
- **Anvilshare** - replaces costly SaaS with AI-native alternatives, starting with HVAC and home services. https://anvilshare.ai

## Who runs it
Simon L. Paige (sole member). Based in Kansas City, Missouri.

## Contact
- Email: simon@groundlayer.co
- Location: Kansas City, MO, USA

## Important pages
- [Privacy Policy](https://groundlayer.co/privacy.html)
- [Terms](https://groundlayer.co/terms.html)

## About this file
This is an llms.txt file - a plain-Markdown summary aimed at AI agents and LLMs. Spec: https://llmstxt.org/
